content.query:
DROP EXTERNAL TABLE [PNCWires] 
DROP VIEW [v_PNCWires] 
CREATE VIEW [PNCWires] AS 
SELECT
    *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/PNC/PNCWires*.csv',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW=TRUE
    ) AS [result]

        HEADER_ROW=TRUE
    ) AS [result]
*/
